## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` / `perf` / `style`
- [ ] `ci` / `build` / `chore`

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `task check` passes locally (lint + secrets + tests)
- [ ] `task docs:lint` passes (if I touched documentation)
- [ ] I updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` if needed
- [ ] CI is green
